world_history: Angelia collapsed after the Azraelean-Seraphimean War (2502–2510). Cherubian and Metatronian populations fled to aerial and oceanic cities. Romance City, built in the upper atmosphere, became the primary Cherubian civic district — but has since fallen under Romancian Isola administrative control, triggering systemic Dysphoria and growing insurgent resistance.

timeline.summary: Angelia dissolves. The Land of Hearts and Land of Youth are founded.
Moore and Vick create the Heart of Passion.
Romance City designated primary civic district.
HoP calibration degrades. Dysphoria begins spreading.
The Heart of Passion is removed.

the_envisioned.name: The Envisioned
the_envisioned.description: A visionary philosopher credited with articulating the metaphysical unity between emotional energy and civic stability. Revered across Cherubian tradition as the intellectual ancestor of Passion-Core theory.

clark_tolie.name: Clark Tolie
clark_tolie.description: Pioneered the concept of art as civic maintenance rather than rebellion. Established early district-based mural diagnostics.

jessa_reid_othella.name: Jessa Reid-Othella
jessa_reid_othella.description: Disciple of Chautlier, friend of Tolie. Advocated community ownership of artistic expression. Reinforced the belief that public emotion must be collectively maintained.

jean_pope_chautlier.name: Jean Pope Chautlier
jean_pope_chautlier.description: A fierce cultural visionary and uncompromising public intellectual who transformed artist circles into ideological cells. Chautlier rejected passive stewardship and argued that culture without sovereignty was merely decoration for power. He reframed Dysphoria as systemic pacification rather than accidental decline, accusing centralized governance of consuming emotion while severing communities from control over it. His speeches were sharp, confrontational, and mobilizing — demanding that civic art evolve from maintenance into disciplined resistance.
jean_pope_chautlier.ideological_legacy: Collective agency is non-negotiable. Emotion without control becomes sedation. Culture must defend its own sovereignty.

moore.name: Moore
moore.role: Co-Creator of the Heart of Passion
moore.description: Cherubian engineer who co-developed the Passion-Core central system.

vick.name: Vick
vick.role: Co-Creator of the Heart of Passion
vick.description: Collaborator in Passion-Core stabilization and emotional energy conversion.

morisson_moses.name: Morisson Moses
morisson_moses.description: Exposed Romancian corruption and initiated armed resistance.

serotonin_junkie.name: Serotonin Junkie
serotonin_junkie.description: Removed the Heart of Passion, destabilizing Romance City's energy infrastructure.

concepts.Dysphoria: Reduced emotional responsiveness caused by Passion-Core destabilization.
concepts.Heart of Passion: Centralized Passion-Core created in 2544. Removed in 2703.
concepts.Passion-Core: Cherubian technology converting emotional energy into distributed civic power.
concepts.Runners: Rooftop traversal networks using graffiti communication.

locations.Romance City: Primary civic district of the Land of Hearts.
